title: hymenophyllum subrigidum
intro: Hymenophyllum subrigidum, also known as a species of the Hymenophyllum genus, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of the world. It is a small, delicate fern that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum subrigidum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hymenophyllum subrigidum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for herbal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
